title: selago nigromontana
intro: Selago nigromontana, also known as Black Mountain Selago, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. It is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant is said to have medicinal properties that help to reduce inflammation, fight off bacterial and fungal infections, and even lower blood pressure. Selago nigromontana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues.
